//: DOM-free program: lib ES2023, types [] — no window/document/HTMLCanvasElement. host.ts and chart.worker.ts are genuinely DOM/webworker-bound (see tsconfig.browser-test.json and tsconfig.worker.json) and are excluded here. index.ts is excluded too because it re-exports host.ts's types/values, which would otherwise pull host.ts's real DOM usage into this program transitively the moment anything importing index.ts is type-checked here — as version.test.ts does, hence its exclusion as well. Excluding index.ts does not weaken the guard: every module it re-exports is still checked directly, as its own root, by this same program.
